nodes.name: Constant
nodes.doc: Outputs the configured value every frame; defaults to 0.0 when unspecified.

params.label: Value
params.doc: Value to emit on the output port each tick.

nodes.name: Slider
nodes.doc: Provides a tunable scalar value constrained to the configured min/max range.

params.label: Min
params.doc: Lower bound for the slider value.

params.label: Max
params.doc: Upper bound for the slider value.

nodes.name: Multi Slider
nodes.doc: Provides three independent slider-controlled scalar outputs for X, Y, and Z.

nodes.name: Add
nodes.doc: Sums all incoming operands, treating missing inputs as 0.

variadic_inputs.label: Operand
variadic_inputs.doc: Each scalar to include in the sum.

nodes.name: Subtract
nodes.doc: Subtracts RHS from LHS; missing inputs default to 0.

nodes.name: Multiply
nodes.doc: Multiplies all incoming operands; missing inputs act as 1.

variadic_inputs.label: Operand
variadic_inputs.doc: Each scalar to include in the product.

nodes.name: Divide
nodes.doc: Divides LHS by RHS; division by zero yields NaN.

nodes.name: Power
nodes.doc: Raises Base to the given Exponent using f32 powf semantics.

nodes.name: Log
nodes.doc: Computes logarithm of Value in the provided Base; invalid bases yield NaN.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.doc: Logarithm base; non-positive or 1.0 results produce NaN.

nodes.name: Sin
nodes.doc: Computes the sine of the input angle (radians).

nodes.name: Cos
nodes.doc: Computes the cosine of the input angle (radians).

nodes.name: Tan
nodes.doc: Computes the tangent of the input angle (radians); results blow up near π/2 + kπ.

nodes.name: Time
nodes.doc: Outputs the graph runtime's elapsed seconds.

nodes.name: Oscillator
nodes.doc: Generates a sine wave using the provided frequency and phase inputs.

inputs.label: Frequency
inputs.doc: Oscillation rate in Hz; accepts scalars or vectors.

inputs.label: Phase
inputs.doc: Phase offset in radians; broadcast across vector frequency inputs.

nodes.name: Spring
nodes.doc: Integrates a critically damped spring toward the Target; zero or non-finite dt snaps to Target.

inputs.label: Target
inputs.doc: Target value to spring toward (scalar or vector).

params.label: Stiffness
params.doc: Hooke's spring constant controlling acceleration toward the target.

params.label: Mass
params.doc: Effective mass of the spring system.

nodes.name: Damp
nodes.doc: Exponentially decays toward the Target using a configurable half-life; zero dt or half-life snaps to Target.

params.label: Half-Life
params.doc: Seconds for the remaining error to halve.

nodes.name: Slew
nodes.doc: Limits the rate of change toward Target using max_rate units per second; zero dt or max_rate snaps to Target.

params.label: Max Rate
params.doc: Maximum units per second the value may change.

nodes.name: And
nodes.doc: Outputs true when both inputs are true; missing inputs default to false.

nodes.name: Or
nodes.doc: Outputs true when either input is true; missing inputs default to false.

nodes.name: Xor
nodes.doc: Outputs true when exactly one input is true; missing inputs default to false.

nodes.name: Not
nodes.doc: Outputs the logical negation of the input; missing input defaults to false.

nodes.name: Greater Than
nodes.doc: Outputs true when LHS is strictly greater than RHS.

nodes.name: Less Than
nodes.doc: Outputs true when LHS is strictly less than RHS.

nodes.name: Equal
nodes.doc: Outputs true when LHS and RHS differ by less than 1e-6.

nodes.name: Not Equal
nodes.doc: Outputs true when LHS and RHS differ by more than 1e-6.

nodes.name: If
nodes.doc: Routes Then when Condition is true, otherwise Else; missing branches default to 0.

inputs.label: Then
inputs.doc: Value emitted when Condition is true.

inputs.label: Else
inputs.doc: Value emitted when Condition is false.

nodes.name: Clamp
nodes.doc: Constrains In between Min and Max; expects Min ≤ Max.

nodes.name: Remap
nodes.doc: Normalizes In from the [In Min, In Max] range into [Out Min, Out Max]; input is clamped to the source range and divide-by-zero yields NaN.

inputs.label: In Min
inputs.doc: Lower bound of the input range.

inputs.label: In Max
inputs.doc: Upper bound of the input range.

inputs.label: Out Min
inputs.doc: Lower bound of the output range.

inputs.label: Out Max
inputs.doc: Upper bound of the output range.

nodes.name: Centered Remap
nodes.doc: Linearly remaps In around an anchor without clamping: values ≤ Anchor use the [In Low, Anchor] span while values ≥ Anchor use [Anchor, In High]; spans may collapse to anchor to pin one side.

inputs.label: In Low
inputs.doc: Reference point for values below the anchor.

inputs.label: In Anchor
inputs.doc: Anchor point separating the low/high spans.

inputs.label: In High
inputs.doc: Reference point for values above the anchor.

nodes.name: Vec3 Cross
nodes.doc: Computes the cross product A × B; mismatched shapes yield NaN components.

nodes.name: Vector Constant
nodes.doc: Outputs the configured vector value each frame.

params.label: Value
params.doc: Vector or numeric value to emit.

nodes.name: Vector Add
nodes.doc: Element-wise sum of A and B; mismatched shapes produce NaN.

nodes.name: Vector Subtract
nodes.doc: Element-wise subtraction A - B; mismatched shapes produce NaN.

nodes.name: Vector Multiply
nodes.doc: Element-wise product of A and B; mismatched shapes produce NaN.

nodes.name: Vector Scale
nodes.doc: Multiplies Vector by Scalar; scalar broadcasts across components.

nodes.name: Vector Normalize
nodes.doc: Normalizes the input vector to unit length; zero-length inputs yield NaN components.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Dot
nodes.doc: Computes the dot product of A and B; mismatched shapes yield NaN.

nodes.name: Vector Length
nodes.doc: Computes the Euclidean length of the input vector; non-numeric inputs yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Index
nodes.doc: Extracts the element at floor(Index); out-of-range indices yield NaN.

inputs.label: Index
inputs.doc: 0-based index; non-integer values are floored; out-of-range produces NaN.

nodes.name: Join
nodes.doc: Concatenates all Operand inputs into a single numeric vector, skipping non-numeric entries.

variadic_inputs.label: Operand
variadic_inputs.doc: Each vector or scalar slice to append in order.

nodes.name: Split
nodes.doc: Splits In into Parts sized by the Sizes param; mismatched totals return NaN-filled segments.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

variadic_outputs.label: Part
variadic_outputs.doc: Returned segment corresponding to each requested size.

params.label: Sizes
params.doc: Vector of sizes (floored to integers). Sum must equal input length; otherwise each part is NaNs of requested size.

nodes.name: Vector Min
nodes.doc: Returns the minimum element of In; empty vectors yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Max
nodes.doc: Returns the maximum element of In; empty vectors yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Mean
nodes.doc: Returns the arithmetic mean of In; empty vectors yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Median
nodes.doc: Returns the median of In (average of middle pair for even counts); empty vectors yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Vector Mode
nodes.doc: Returns the most frequent non-NaN value in In; ties choose the smallest value; empty vectors yield NaN.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Input numeric vector; accepts scalars and arrays.

nodes.name: Weighted Sum Vector
nodes.doc: Pre-computes aggregate blend statistics from Values, optionally applying Weights and Masks; mismatched lengths return NaNs.

inputs.label: Values
inputs.doc: Per-input channel values used when computing blend sums.

inputs.label: Weights
inputs.doc: Per-input weights (single scalar broadcasts to all values).

inputs.label: Masks
inputs.doc: Optional 0/1 mask enabling contributions; single scalar broadcasts to all values.

outputs.label: Max Effective Weight
outputs.doc: max(weight_i × mask_i); 0.0 when no inputs provided.

nodes.name: Default Blend
nodes.doc: Produces a weighted sum of operand inputs plus Baseline and Offset; handles weight broadcasting and falls back to neutral/null when counts mismatch.

inputs.label: Baseline
inputs.doc: Base value scaled by the remaining weight (clamped at zero).

inputs.label: Weights
inputs.doc: Optional per-target weights; single value broadcasts to all targets.

variadic_inputs.label: Operand
variadic_inputs.doc: Operand values to blend before adding baseline and offset.

nodes.name: Blend - Weighted Average
nodes.doc: Normalises Total Weighted Sum by Total Weight / Max Effective Weight; falls back when the divisor is invalid.

inputs.label: Max Effective Weight
inputs.doc: max(weight_i × mask_i); used to normalise the divisor.

inputs.label: Fallback
inputs.doc: Used when total_weight is zero or the average cannot be computed.

nodes.name: Blend - Additive
nodes.doc: Outputs Total Weighted Sum when any inputs contribute; otherwise emits Fallback or NaN.

inputs.label: Fallback
inputs.doc: Fallback value when no inputs contribute.

nodes.name: Blend - Multiply
nodes.doc: Multiplies contributions using (1 - weight) + value × weight × mask for each entry; mismatched lengths yield NaN, empty input returns 1.

inputs.label: Weights
inputs.doc: Per-input weights (single scalar broadcasts to all values).

inputs.label: Masks
inputs.doc: Optional 0/1 mask enabling contributions; single scalar broadcasts to all values.

outputs.label: Out
outputs.doc: Product over inputs of (1 - weight_i) + value_i × weight_i × mask_i.

nodes.name: Blend - Weighted Overlay
nodes.doc: Interpolates between Base and Total Weighted Sum using Max Effective Weight as the blend factor; invalid weights yield NaN.

inputs.label: Max Effective Weight
inputs.doc: max(weight_i × mask_i) used as interpolation factor.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.doc: Optional base value to blend from.

nodes.name: Blend - Weighted Average Overlay
nodes.doc: Computes an averaged offset and adds it to Base; falls back to Base when averaging fails.

inputs.label: Total Weighted Sum
inputs.doc: Σ(delta_i × weight_i × mask_i) where delta is (value - base).

inputs.label: Max Effective Weight
inputs.doc: max(weight_i × mask_i) used to normalise the divisor.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.doc: Optional base value the averaged delta is applied to.

nodes.name: Blend - Max
nodes.doc: Selects the value whose weight × mask is largest; scales it by that effective weight or falls back to Base when none contribute.

inputs.label: Weights
inputs.doc: Per-input weights (single scalar broadcasts to all values).

inputs.label: Masks
inputs.doc: Optional 0/1 mask enabling contributions; single scalar broadcasts to all values.

inputs.label: Base
inputs.doc: Fallback value returned when no effective weight is positive.

nodes.name: Case
nodes.doc: Selects the case value whose label matches Selector; returns Default or NaN when no match is found.

inputs.label: Selector
inputs.doc: Value compared against the configured case_labels (exact match).

inputs.label: Default
inputs.doc: Value returned when no case label matches the selector.

variadic_inputs.label: Case Value
variadic_inputs.doc: Values routed when their corresponding case_labels entry equals the selector.

outputs.label: Out
outputs.doc: Clone of the matched case value or the default when no match is found.

params.label: Case Labels
params.doc: Array of string labels; entry i maps to variadic input operand_i.

nodes.name: Inverse Kinematics
nodes.doc: Analytic planar 3-bone IK solver; returns joint angles or NaNs when the target is unreachable.

inputs.label: Bone1
inputs.doc: Length of the first bone segment.

inputs.label: Bone2
inputs.doc: Length of the second bone segment.

nodes.name: URDF IK (Position)
nodes.doc: Solves for joint angles that reach Target Position using the configured URDF chain; errors when URDF data is missing or the target is unreachable.

nodes.name: URDF IK (Pose)
nodes.doc: Solves for joint angles matching both Target Position and Target Rotation; errors when the pose is unreachable or input shapes are invalid.

nodes.name: URDF FK
nodes.doc: Applies forward kinematics for the configured URDF chain using provided joint values or defaults.

inputs.label: Joint Values
inputs.doc: Record or array of joint angles (radians).

outputs.label: Rotation
outputs.doc: Tip orientation as quaternion (x, y, z, w).

outputs.label: Transform
outputs.doc: Full pose convenience output (pos + rot + unit scale).

params.label: Joint Defaults
params.doc: Fallback joint list [[name, angle], ...] when input misses entries.

nodes.name: Input
nodes.doc: Reads a staged value from the host path or emits the configured Default; enforces declared output shape when provided.

outputs.label: Out
outputs.doc: Staged input value forwarded into the graph.

params.label: Path
params.doc: TypedPath string used to stage host inputs (e.g. robot1/Joint.angle).

params.label: Default
params.doc: Optional fallback emitted when no staged input is present.

nodes.name: Output
nodes.doc: Publishes In to the host path while passing the value through for downstream nodes.

inputs.label: In
inputs.doc: Value to publish via TypedPath write.

outputs.label: Out
outputs.doc: Passthrough copy of the input value for chaining.

params.label: Path
params.doc: TypedPath string used when queuing external writes.
